title: BaseConnect onboarding storyboard health — docker backend
description: Cold-start top-level health profile for the full DEV Storyboard + BaseConnect onboarding path with frontend runtime configured against the Docker/local backend stack. Reuses the shared Storyboard/dashboard cold-start health template while keeping the Docker backend branch independent from staging.

checks.repairHint: Repair the failing child owner shown in the tree: bc-frontend should start the Docker web app/backend surfaces without falling back to staging; bc-storyboard should restore the storyboard source/check-all endpoint; ddev-storyboard should restore the Health Dashboard or storyboard editor route. Current resolved URLs belong in row details/evidence only; no fake repair button is exposed here.
